docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-27-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC (DAN SCANLAN) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TARON GREGG IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF TEGSO LLC IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TARON GREGG IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE WAS $120.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TESGO LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GREGG, TARON
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN FILED BY PLAINTIFF TESGO LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TESGO LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GREGG, TARON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
